rationale: Implements Phase 9 of the Go CCC platform: AI + Intelligence layer following DDD + Clean Architecture + TDD. internal/domain/ai/entity_phase9.go adds 8 aggregates: DigitalEmployee/DigitalEmployeeScene (intent/FAQ matching with transfer-to-human triggers), QARule (11 rule types: keyword, regex, silence, speed, interruption, energy, duration, entity, role, abnormal_hangup, llm), QAScheme (multi-rule weighted combination), QAResult (appeal/review workflow with completed -> appealed -> reviewed transitions enforced by status checks), ASRHotwords, PerformanceScorecard. internal/domain/ai/service_phase9.go (581 lines) wires DigitalEmployeeService.MatchIntent (JSON-Unmarshal scene.Intents into IntentConfig[], iterate keywords with containsIgnoreCase using strings.ToLower for Unicode safety, return IntentMatchResult with Transfer flag), QualityInspectionService.RunInspection (validates non-empty transcript with ErrEmptyTranscript, fetches scheme rules via ListByIDs, evaluates each rule via evaluateRule, computes weighted score as sum(rule_score * weight) / total_weight), and Appeal/Review state machine. internal/application/aianalysis/service.go adds 13 LLM operations (Summarize, AnalyzeSentiment, ExtractTags, PredictSatisfaction, AnalyzeIVRPath, JudgeCompletion, ExtractPostCallActions, AutoFillTicket, RecommendScript, RunBatchTagAnalysis, AnalyzeHotwords with CJK-aware splitWords). 27 new test functions covering all aggregates and the AI analysis service. The LLM dependency is via the pluggable Provider interface from internal/infrastructure/llm with StubProvider (documented as 'replace with Aliyun Tongyi'), not a hallucinated import. 41 new HTTP endpoints added under /api/v1 in router.go matching the body's enumeration. Substantive, well-tested implementation matching the PR title.
